items.title: New: Desmond Bane will return to FedExForum for the first time since last summer's blockbuster trade when the #Magic open the preseason Oct. 7 at Memphis.
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
New: Desmond Bane will return to FedExForum for the first time since last summer's blockbuster trade when the #Magic open the preseason Oct. 7 at Memphis.

Orlando, which finalized its preseason slate Monday, will play two preseason road games in 2026: www.orlandosentinel.com/2026/07/20/o...

media.title: Magic finalize NBA preseason schedule for 2026, to play two road games
media.description: In addition to two home preseason games, the Magic will play two road preseason games. Orlando will open the NBA preseason at Memphis on Oct. 7.
